segments.text: And here are the various responses to that consistent down tilt, such a powerful move
segments.original_text: さあ安定した下強という強力な技に対しての回答の数々

segments.text: With how this is going, it looks like even Tweek can't land easy KOs
segments.original_text: こうなってくるとツイークもやはり一筋縄で撃墜は通せないか
ベク変しても入るんだ

full_text: And here are the various responses to that consistent down tilt, such a powerful move With how this is going, it looks like even Tweek can't land easy KOs It connects even with DI! It lands! No way! Wow...

corrections.corrected: ベク変しても入るんだ
corrections.rule: Smash terminology (ベクトル変更→ベク変)
